---
id: oct24-4
name: Hard But Not As Hard — Demonize the Alternative
technique: reversal
platforms: [x]
tags: [comparison, demonize-alternative, two-camps, engagement, single-sentence]
source_month: "2024-10"
---

## Why It Works

The comparison of one thing that's very difficult (solopreneurship) is made to seem less difficult when you overly-demonize the worst part about the safe, corporate role (feeling undervalued for 2,000+ hours per year). Plus, this post naturally puts people into two different camps, which creates engagement.

## Template

Being a [challenging role] is extremely hard, but it's not as hard as [negative experience] for [large number] hours per year.

## Example

Being a marathon runner is extremely hard, but it's not as hard as sitting at a desk for 3,000+ hours per year.
